stories.title: Translate 'Mai mult' to 'More' in English mode
stories.description: In src/ui/src/components/Header.jsx, find where 'Mai mult' is used as the dropdown label for the 'More' menu. Replace the hardcoded Romanian string with t('nav.more') or equivalent i18n call. Then add the key to ALL language files: en.json -> "nav": { "more": "More" }, ro.json already has nav section. Check bg.json, hu.json, uk.json too. GitHub #406.

stories.title: Add /#/alerte/<slug> hash route for alert detail in SPA
stories.description: In src/ui/src/App.jsx, add a hash route handler for alert detail pages. Add before the CONTENT_CATEGORIES loop: const alerteMatch = hash.match(/^#\/alerte\/(.+)$/); if (alerteMatch) return <PageShell><AlertDetail slug={alerteMatch[1]} /></PageShell>; Create a new AlertDetail.jsx component that fetches /api/alerts and finds the matching alert by slug, then renders its details (title, description, target, severity, recommendations). If no match, show 'Alert not found'. GitHub #407.

stories.title: Fix feed.noItems raw translation key on content categories
stories.description: In src/ui/src/components/ContentList.jsx line 39, the t('feed.noItems') call renders the raw key. Check if 'feed.noItems' exists in en.json — it does exist in ro.json (line 267: 'no_posts' not 'noItems'). The key might be wrong. Check the actual key path: ro.json has 'feed': {'noItems': ...} — verify. If the key exists but t() fails, the i18n context may not be available. Also fix line 38-39: move the empty state AFTER the h1 heading so the category title always shows. GitHub #408.

stories.title: Fix language dropdown clipping and prefix/name overlap
stories.description: In the language switcher component (likely Header.jsx or a LangSwitcher sub-component), the dropdown items show clipped text like 'RORom...', 'BGБъл...'. The dropdown container is too narrow and the language code prefix overlaps with the language name. Fix: increase dropdown min-width to fit longest language name (e.g., min-w-40 or w-48). Separate the prefix code from the name with a space or remove the prefix entirely. Ensure dropdown doesn't overflow the viewport on the right side. GitHub #409.

stories.title: Show category heading even when content list is empty
stories.description: In src/ui/src/components/ContentList.jsx, the empty state (items.length === 0) returns at line 38-39 BEFORE the h1 at line 44 is rendered. Fix: restructure so the h1 with translated category name always renders, and the empty message appears below it. Move lines 38-40 to after line 44. GitHub #411.
